image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: What if I told you some creatures wear the same dangerous costume?
Context visual: This is called Mullerian mimicry—where harmful species share similar warning signals.
Escalation visual: This strategy benefits them all. Predators learn to avoid their shared colors!
Evidence visual: Examples? Think of butterflies, wasps, and even some frogs—all sharing bright warning patterns.
Payoff visual: But here's the twist—this mimicry isn't always perfect. Uncertainty lurks in nature!
Cta visual: Curious for more science secrets? Hit that like button and follow for the next mystery!
